criteria.criterion: CurrentVersion updated via CAS only after new version file is durably written
criteria.covered_by: CommitVersion's ordering: WriteVersion (durable, fsync+rename) happens before CompareAndSwapCurrentVersion is ever called; TestCurrentVersionCAS's final content-match assertion (on-disk file content matches the record the CAS published) empirically confirms the CAS never points at data that wasn't durably written first.

criteria.criterion: Failed CAS (concurrent writer won) retries without corrupting state
criteria.covered_by: CommitVersion's for-loop: on ok=false, re-Get + re-WriteVersion + re-CAS; TestCurrentVersionCAS's 30-goroutine race with -race detects any data race, and the distinct-version-per-goroutine + content-match assertions detect any corruption/overwrite.
TestCurrentVersionCAS added to engine/mvcc/write_test.go; run green under -race (see self-consistency.json).

criteria.criterion: Exactly the expected final currentVersion, no lost updates
criteria.covered_by: Defined explicitly in plan.md/architecture-discovery.md: final CurrentVersion == max on-disk version-file number for the fileID; asserted via countVersionFiles helper. No lost updates == all N goroutines return distinct successful versions (asserted via a seen-set) and the winning version file's content matches its owner.
go test ./mvcc/... -race -v -count=1 includes TestVersionWriter unchanged and passing; go test ./... full-repo sweep green.
